|body= {{Background|file=Level_-24.png}}
'''Level 256: "Labyrinth of Echoes"''' {{Class 3|color-h=0|color-s=0%|color-l=100%|class=Theta|safety=Varying Safety|security=Unstable|entity=Constantly Altering Geometry|hexagon=θ}} '''Level 256''' is the 257th level of the Backrooms. ==Description== |-| The Maze='''Level 256''', also known as the '''"Labyrinth of Echoes"''', is a level consisting of a vast maze. The walls are formed with peculiar patterns of an unknown type of thread that seem to shift and morph as wanderers navigate through the labyrinth. The maze structure is complex and with paths that lead to dead ends. Walls are covered in a luminescent substance, casting such an intense glow that it can harm the human eye. The color palette ranges from pitch black to a really bright white. Its floor is completely covered in the same thread as in the walls, adding another obstacle to wanderers willing to explore the level, searching for an exit. {{Blurimage|file=Level_-24.png|caption=An image of The Maze. Photographer deceased.}} {{Blurimage|file=SKY.png|caption=An image of the sky taken from The Maze. Same photographer.}} The ambience within the labyrinth is filled with a haunting echo, easily driving any wanderer insane. Faint whispers seem to emanate from the walls, blurring the line between reality and the echoes of the '''Echo Walkers'''. Wanderers reported finding parts in Level 256 that contain the unexplored [[Object 3|Nuclear Infection]] that originates from [[Level 630]]. This does not seem to affect the level, however. Neither the weather nor the climate change the level; it is permanently stuck to a bright white sky and a foggy ambient, which makes it difficult for the wanderers to locate themselves inside the maze. Wanderers report temporary blindness from staring too long at the bright sky. One may experience the "rearrangement" of Level 256, which is the phenomenon when parts of Level 256 are suddenly torn and rapidly rearranged, creating a dead end. But if one manages to fall while such phenomenon is happening, they will end up at [[The Void]].
"Z.E.T.A. has something to do with all of this nonsense! This level is... alive...?"
— ███████ J.
Safe zones within the labyrinth can be found, providing temporary shelters from the echoes. These areas are characterized by a lack of echoes and a subtle hum. However, these safe zones are momentary, and wanderers must continue their journey. |-| The Void= {{Blurimage|file=-12VOID.png|caption=An image of '''The Void'''. Photographer deceased.}} Within the Labyrinth, there are multiple ways to no-clip out, being intentional or not. Although, this Level has a "self-protection" for those who want to "cheat", it's called '''The Void''' (not to be confused with [[The Void]]). '''The Void''' consists of a vast and infinite black empty space. '''The Void''' shows no signs of forms of life. Although, no wanderers have ever touched the atoms of that area, therefore, it is unknown if it's safe or not. Wanderers reported to find holes in the '''Labyrinth''' that lead to '''The Void''', although, all of the found holes closes in milisseconds after the wanderers see them, so if you see one, consider yourself lucky. It's speculated that '''The Void''' is a space "in-between" [[Level 255]] and [[Level 257]]. Due to it's unexplored nature, there isn't much information to get from '''The Void''' currently. |-| = ? ==Entities== ===Echo Walkers=== While entities in Level 256 are not as hostile as those in other levels, there are beings known as ''Echo Walkers''. These translucent entities move silently through the maze, leaving echoes in their path. They are drawn to the sounds made by wanderers, making it crucial for anyone traversing the labyrinth to move cautiously. Echo Walkers are harmless unless provoked, Echo Walkers become more assertive if provoked, they can quickly increase their height to find their prey easily. {{Blurimage|file=CBW.png|caption=An image of a '''Coagulated Blood Wasp'''.}} ===Coagulated Blood Wasps=== One can find a subspecies of the [[Entity 34|Blood Wasps]] within Level 256, colloquially named '''Coagulated Blood Wasps'''' by scientists due to their dark color. Wanderers have reported the sting to be painful; the venom can be lethal for inexperienced wanderers due to its acidic properties. Furthermore, this variation stands out from the rest, attacking each entity that, in its usual form, was once an ally. It fits for the same entity: Coagulated Blood Wasps will attack Blood Wasps, considering them enemies of their specimens. The variation of this peculiar form perceives up to 150 frames per second. They can perhaps reach speeds of 30 km/h when starving. Additionally, these variants are way more aggressive towards wanderers and can harm them even if the specific Coagulated Blood Wasp is not hungry. This variation highlights the ability of Blood Wasps to adapt to new environments. ===Echo Phantoms=== There are reports of "Echo forms" of other Backrooms entities, such as "Echo Skin-Stealers", "Echo Smilers", "Echo Death Moths" and other entities; they are denominated by researchers "'''Echo Phantoms'''." They have a lot of unknown properties and theories circulating around them, mostly if they are responsible for the whispering that faintly floods the level. ==Colonies and Outposts== {{Blurimage|file=-12key.jpg|caption=An image of the only known Level 256 key.}} {{Blurimage|file=Redhive.png|caption=An image of a Coagulated Blood Wasp Hive.}} As stated before, the level has no colonies or outposts. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances:=== *The train in [[Level 154]] may take one here. *No-clipping through a mirror that has a white neon light above it in [[Level 305#The_Neon_Mirrors|Level 305]] may lead one here. *Exiting [[Level 506]] will most commonly lead here. ===Exits:=== *Fall in the gap when a dead end opens and one will fall into [[The Void]]. *Tie one with a thread and one will be taken to [[Level 16]]. {{Audio|file=A4.mp3|volume=0.21|}} }}}}}}
